title: July 15
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 15''' is the 196th day (197th in leap years) of the year, with 169 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Celia Imrie]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Forest Whitaker]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Miles Richardson]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Amanda Foreman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Adam Savage]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Kelly Sue DeConnick]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Jim Rash]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Hassani Shapi]] is born.
*[[1979]] – ''[[The Kashyyyk Depths]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1981]] – [[Amanda Lucas]] is born.
*[[2001]] – [[Tom Chantrell]] died.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' released.
*[[2007]] – [[Celebration Europe (2007)|Celebration Europe]] ends.
*[[2009]] – [[Jamaal Avery Jr.]] is born.
*2009 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 43|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 43]] published.
*2009 – [[The Clone Wars 7|''The Clone Wars'' 7]] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (video game)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] releases the [[Mission to Iceberg Three]] campaign.
*[[2013]] – [[LEGO Star Wars: The Yoda Chronicles (book)|''LEGO Star Wars: The Yoda Chronicles'']] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 7|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 7]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2017]] – [[William Hoyland]] died.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge - Episode 7|''Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge'' - Episode 7]] premieres on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids YouTube channel]].
*2020 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 32|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 32]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The Rebellion Omnibus Vol. 3]]'' published.
<noinclude>
